_comment: Sample Jira webhook payload for a ticket status change to Blocked. Used to test blocker-router.json.

fields.description:
Deploy the new Elasticsearch-based search service to staging for QA sign-off.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Search service deployed to staging-us-east-1
- Health check endpoint returns 200
- QA can run smoke tests

comments.body: Deployment is failing. The CI/CD pipeline can't find the ECR image. Error: `manifest for ecr.aws/.../search-service:latest not found`. Looks like the image wasn't pushed in the last build.
Checked the build logs — the Docker push step timed out. Might be an IAM permissions issue on the build role.
